reason: Regulatory pressure on stablecoin rewards poses a significant headwind, threatening key liquidity and yield mechanisms within the crypto ecosystem. This, combined with internal governance debates within Bitcoin and high retail speculative activity, suggests increased volatility and potential for smart money to exit positions. While traditional finance (TradFi) interest in prediction markets indicates growing legitimization, immediate risks are elevated due to regulatory uncertainty and internal strife.
headlines: Vitalik Buterin unveils plan to curb Ethereum block builder centralization
